title: Epigenomics and bolting tolerance in sugar beet genotypes.
author: Hebrard C Peterson DG Willems G Delaunay A Jesson B Lefebvre M Barnes S Maury S
content: S-EPMC4682430 PMC4682430 Epigenomics and bolting tolerance in sugar beet genotypes. In sugar beet (Beta vulgaris altissima), bolting tolerance is an essential agronomic trait reflecting the bolting response of genotypes after vernalization.
